args.content:
# Hawaii Vacation Packing List

## Clothing
- Swimwear (2-3 sets)
- Beach cover-ups
- Flip-flops/sandals
- Casual t-shirts and shorts
- Light sweater or jacket (for cooler evenings)
- Dressy outfit (for nice dinners)
- Underwear and socks
- Sleepwear
- Hat/cap for sun protection
- Sunglasses

## Beach & Water Activities
- Reef-safe sunscreen (SPF 30 or higher)
- After-sun lotion (aloe vera)
- Snorkeling gear (mask, snorkel, fins)
- Beach towel
- Waterproof phone case
- Dry bag
- Water shoes
- Rash guard (for sun protection while swimming)

## Hiking & Outdoor Activities
- Hiking shoes/boots
- Hiking backpack
- Water bottle/hydration pack
- Lightweight rain jacket
- Headlamp/flashlight
- Insect repellent

## Electronics
- Smartphone and charger
- Camera and charger
- Power bank
- Travel adapter (if needed)
- Headphones

## Toiletries
- Toothbrush and toothpaste
- Shampoo and conditioner
- Body wash
- Deodorant
- Razor and shaving cream
- Makeup and makeup remover
- Hairbrush/comb
- Hair styling tools
- Feminine hygiene products
- Prescription medications
- First aid kit

## Documents & Money
- Passport (if traveling internationally to Hawaii)
- Driver's license/ID
- Flight tickets/boarding passes
- Hotel reservation details
- Travel insurance documents
- Credit cards
- Cash (some local currency)
- Emergency contact information

## Special Items for Planned Activities
- For Hanauma Bay snorkeling: Underwater camera
- For Diamond Head hike: Trekking poles
- For Luau: Leis (or buy locally)
- For spa day: Swimsuit
- For shopping: Reusable shopping bag

## Miscellaneous
- Books or e-reader
- Travel journal
- Snacks for travel days
- Reusable water bottle
- Laundry bag
- Small padlock (for hotel safe)
- Ziplock bags (various sizes)

Have a wonderful vacation in Hawaii!

2. Created a comprehensive packing list based on your itinerary and activities
3. Saved the document as "hawaii-packing-list.docx"
4. Shared the document with john.doe@gmail.com with read and write permissions

The packing list includes items for all your planned activities in Hawaii, such as:
- Beach days at Waikiki and Kailua Beach
- Snorkeling at Hanauma Bay
- Hiking at Diamond Head
- The luau at Polynesian Cultural Center
- Spa day at your hotel
- Shopping at Ala Moana Center

The document is now accessible to both you and John Doe, and you can both view or edit it as needed. Have a wonderful vacation in Hawaii!
